exploration_notes:
The log line ending normalization is implemented in the `log/` package. `CRLFWriter` in `log/formatters.go` (lines 50-74) wraps an `io.Writer` to convert bare `
` to `
` while preserving existing `
` sequences via a `lastByte` state tracker that persists across partial writes. `SetOutput()` in `log/log.go` (lines 140-147) conditionally wraps the output writer with `CRLFWriter` when `runtime.GOOS == "windows"`. The call chain starts from `conf/configuration.go:345` which calls `log.SetOutp
